name: Better History Search
description: Binds Up/Down arrows to history search filtered by already-typed prefix, like fish shell.
snippet:
Set-PSReadLineKeyHandler -Key UpArrow -Function HistorySearchBackward
Set-PSReadLineKeyHandler -Key DownArrow -Function HistorySearchForward

name: Predictive IntelliSense
description: Enables inline command completion suggestions from command history, shown in grey as you type.

name: Starship Prompt
description: Initializes the Starship cross-shell prompt. Requires starship to be installed.

name: Oh My Posh Prompt
description: Loads Oh My Posh with a specified theme. Replace 'jandedobbeleer' with any installed theme name.

name: posh-git Integration
description: Loads posh-git for git tab completion and git status in the prompt.

name: Useful Aliases
description: Common Unix-style aliases: touch, which, grep, and a reload-profile alias.

name: Environment Variable Helpers
description: Functions to list, get, set, and remove environment variables conveniently from the prompt.

name: Quick Navigation Functions
description: Shortcuts for common directories: dev, desktop, downloads, and a 'back' alias for cd ..

name: Colorized Directory Listing
description: Replaces default ls/dir output with a colorized version using the Terminal-Icons module.

name: Auto-elevate to Admin
description: Function that restarts the current command in an elevated (Administrator) session.

name: Git Log Graph Alias
description: Alias 'gl' that shows a compact colorized git log graph.

name: Clipboard Utilities
description: Functions to copy file content or command output to clipboard, and paste from clipboard.
snippet:
function Copy-File { Get-Content $args[0] | Set-Clipboard }
function Paste-Here { Get-Clipboard | Out-File $args[0] }
